allow: Bash(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const lines=d.split\('\\n'\);const out=lines.filter\(l=>/error|Error|✓ built|fail|Could not|not exported|is not defined/i.test\(l\)\);console.log\(out.slice\(-20\).join\('\\n'\)\)}\)")
